summary: First iteration testing of GlowCare conversation history feature. Tested backend APIs (14 tests, all passed) and frontend UI flows (Playwright). All core features are working correctly.

react_native_issues.issue: No testID attributes on interactive elements (back button, card touch, history button). Makes automated testing harder but does not affect functionality.

action_items: Optional: Add testID attributes to key interactive elements (history button, cards, back buttons) for better automated test coverage
seed_data_creation: Created 3 test conversations via POST /api/conversations/analyze during backend tests (user_id=demo-user-123, prefixed with 'TEST_')
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend and frontend flows for conversation history feature are verified working. Backend routes are: POST /api/conversations/analyze, GET /api/conversations/{user_id}/history (pagination with cursor), GET /api/conversations/detail/{id}. Frontend routes: /conversations (main page), /conversations/history (list), /conversations/{id} (detail). STT is MOCKED (returns hardcoded Chinese text). Version warnings for expo-av, react-native-worklets are expected and can be ignored.
